features.name: for loop init clause with always-false condition
features.description: Code should include a for loop with initialization that should execute even when the loop condition evaluates to false from the start

features.name: loop variable usage after non-executing for loop
features.description: Code should include a loop variable that is used after a for loop whose condition was always false, expecting the initialized value
features.snippet:
for (i=0; i<0; i=i+1) begin end
out[i] <= 1'b1;
